# Daniel Hunt

> Independent AI and data engineer. I help companies design, build, and operate AI products and data systems — audits, infrastructure, agents, pipelines, and custom applications.

- **Name:** Daniel Hunt
- **Role:** AI Engineer & Consultant
- **Website:** https://danielhunt.dev
- **Email:** contact@danielhunt.dev
- **Based:** Works remotely with clients globally
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/danielhunt16/
- **X:** https://x.com/_danielhunt

## Services

- **AI Audit** — Structured review of an organisation's existing AI usage covering accuracy, cost, latency, security, governance, and risk. Deliverable: a prioritised action list and an honest assessment of which AI features deliver value.
- **AI Infrastructure** — Production-grade foundations: RAG pipelines, vector databases, model gateways, evaluation harnesses, observability, and CI/CD for AI systems.
- **Agent & Workflow Automation** — Custom agents and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers that integrate with tools like Slack, Notion, Linear, and internal APIs to automate repetitive work.
- **Custom App Development** — Full-stack AI-powered applications built on FastAPI, Next.js, and Supabase. From prototype to production.

## Stack

Python (FastAPI, FastMCP), TypeScript (Next.js, App Router), Supabase (Postgres + Auth), Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui. Deployment on Vercel and Render. Models from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google.

## Engagement

- One-week audits to multi-month builds.
- Free 30-minute scoping calls.
- Typical reply time: within two working days.
- Contact: contact@danielhunt.dev

## Pages

- [Home](https://danielhunt.dev/): overview, services, about, FAQ, contact form
